event: Vermont Green FC defeated Ocean City Nor'easters 4-0 in the USL League Two Playoffs Round of 16 at Virtue Field, advancing to the Eastern Conference Quarterfinals.
Ocean City Nor'easters were eliminated from the USL League Two Playoffs, losing 0-4 to Vermont Green FC in the Round of 16.
Ventura County Fusion defeated San Francisco City FC 6-1 at Kezar Stadium in the USL League Two Playoffs, advancing to the Conference Quarterfinals.
San Francisco City FC were eliminated from the USL League Two Playoffs after a 1-6 home loss to Ventura County Fusion at Kezar Stadium.
Vermont Green FC's Round of 16 playoff match sold out at Virtue Field, with fans watching for free on the hill behind the north goal.
Vermont Green FC completed a second consecutive unbeaten USL League Two regular season, finishing 13W-1D-0L to claim the Northeast Division title.
Union Omaha sit 1st in USL League One with 28 points from 14 matches (9W-1D-4L), holding a 1-point lead over second-place One Knoxville SC.
Former two-time USL Championship MVP Solomon Asante was named assistant coach of Texoma FC in USL League Two, transitioning from player to technical staff.
Romeo Beckham signed with Fort Lauderdale CF, drawing significant media attention to the League One club.
USMNT and Borussia Mönchengladbach midfielder Giovanni Reyna joined the ownership group of Fort Lauderdale United FC.
Richmond Kickers parted ways with head coach Darren Sawatzky in a rare mid-season dismissal.
Athletic Club Boise's soccer-specific Stadium at Expo Idaho opened at a cost of $42 million, seating 6,225 fans with expansion potential to over 11,000.

North Carolina FC suspended operations after the 2025 USL Championship season and filed a formal application to join USL Premier (Division One) in 2028, contingent on securing a 15,000-seat soccer-specific stadium in Raleigh.
Brooklyn FC completed their inaugural USL Championship season debut in 2026, one year after their originally planned launch.
Pittsburgh Riverhounds SC hosted Louisville City FC in a nationally broadcast Saturday matchup at F.N.B. Stadium; score unconfirmed.
Louisville City FC traveled to play Pittsburgh Riverhounds SC on Saturday in a high-profile regular season matchup; score unconfirmed.
